name: ana-hr-operations
description: Extend Ana's established HR delivery method across client work, recruiting, research, Google Docs and Canva template execution, and commercial administration—with human approval at every decision boundary.

interface.shortDescription: Extend Ana's established, human-led HR delivery method.
interface.longDescription: Carry approved client work through recruiting operations, interconnected Google Docs and Canva template jobs, commercial preparation, research, and content while Ana's team owns delivery and named humans retain every decision and external send.
defaultPrompt: Run Ana's manager morning control and approval queue.
Run the 20–30 minute first-client-call SOP with a template route.
Run Template Studio on a practice offer or invoice, then stop for Ana's approval.
